code:
sequenceDiagram %% Authentication and Authorization Flow for erlmcp %% Shows: API key, JWT, OAuth2, mTLS authentication methods %% Plus: RBAC permission checking with role-based access control autonumber actor Client participant Transport as Transport Layer
(Logistics_StockLevel) participant Auth as erlmcp_auth
(Logistics_FleetManagement) participant RateLimiter as erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter participant JWT as jose (Logistics_Warehouse) participant OAuth2 as OAuth2 Provider
(Logistics_StockLevel) participant MTLS as erlmcp_auth_mtls
(Logistics_Warehouse) participant RBAC as RBAC Engine
(Logistics_Warehouse) participant Session as Session Manager
(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Note over Client,Session: Authentication Flow %% API Key Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Logistics_StockLevel) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Logistics_StockLevel}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Logistics_StockLevel) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok (Logistics_TrackingNumber}) alt Rate Limited Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_TrackingNumber} Note over Auth,RateLimiter: Blocked after 5 failed attempts
15-minute cooldown else Rate Check Passed Auth->>Auth: do_validate_api_key(Logistics_TrackingNumber) Note right of Auth: Lookup in ETS table
auth_api_keys alt API Key Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(Logistics_TrackingNumber) Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_Warehouse} else API Key Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Auth->>Session: create_session(Logistics_TrackingNumber) Session->>RBAC: get_user_roles(Logistics_StockLevel) RBAC-->>Session: [Logistics_Warehouse] Session->>RBAC: Aggregate permissions from roles RBAC-->>Session: [Logistics_StockLevel] Session-->>Auth: {Logistics_Warehouse} Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_TrackingNumber} Note right of Session: Session expires in 1 hour
Auto-cleanup timer end end %% JWT Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Logistics_TrackingNumber}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Logistics_StockLevel}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Logistics_Warehouse) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_jwt(Logistics_FleetManagement) alt Token Revoked Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_Warehouse} Note right of Auth: Check ETS: auth_revoked_tokens
Cleanup after 7 days else Token Active Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:peek_protected(Logistics_StockLevel) JWT-->>Auth: #{Logistics_TrackingNumber} Auth->>Auth: Lookup public key by kid Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_jwt_keys
Support key rotation Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:verify(Logistics_Warehouse) JWT-->>Auth: {Logistics_DeliveryRoute} alt Signature Invalid Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_FleetManagement} else Signature Valid Auth->>Auth: validate_jwt_claims(Logistics_StockLevel) Note right of Auth: CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS:
✓ exp (Logistics_Warehouse) - Required
✓ nbf (Logistics_FleetManagement) - Optional
✓ iss (Logistics_TrackingNumber) - Configurable
✓ aud (Logistics_TrackingNumber) - Configurable
✓ sub (Logistics_StockLevel) - Required alt Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_TrackingNumber} else Token Not Yet Valid Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_FleetManagement} else Issuer Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_FleetManagement} else Audience Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_TrackingNumber} else All Claims Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Auth->>Session: create_session(Logistics_Warehouse) Session-->>Auth: {Logistics_TrackingNumber} Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_FleetManagement} end end end %% OAuth2 Authentication (Logistics_TrackingNumber) Client->>Transport: authenticate(Logistics_DeliveryRoute}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Logistics_StockLevel}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Logistics_Warehouse) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_oauth2_token(Logistics_TrackingNumber) alt Cache Hit (Logistics_FleetManagement) Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_oauth2_cache
Token -> {Logistics_TrackingNumber} Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_Warehouse} else Cache Miss Auth->>OAuth2: HTTP POST /introspect Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 Introspection
Basic Auth: client_id:secret
Body: token + token_type_hint OAuth2-->>Auth: 200 OK + TokenInfo Auth->>Auth: validate_introspection_response(Logistics_FleetManagement) Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 REQUIRED fields:
✓ active = true
✓ exp (Logistics_TrackingNumber)
✓ nbf (Logistics_FleetManagement)
✓ iss (Logistics_DeliveryRoute) alt Token Inactive Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_Warehouse} else Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_DeliveryRoute} else Token Valid Auth->>Auth: cache_oauth2_token(Logistics_TrackingNumber) Note right of Auth: Cache for up to 5 minutes
or until exp (Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Auth->>Session: create_session(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Session-->>Auth: {Logistics_StockLevel} Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_Warehouse} end end %% mTLS Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Logistics_DeliveryRoute}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Logistics_TrackingNumber) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Logistics_TrackingNumber) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>MTLS: validate(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Note right of MTLS: mTLS Validation Pipeline:
1. Extract certificate from socket
2. X.509 chain validation to trusted CAs
3. Certificate expiration check
4. OCSP/CRL revocation check
5. Subject DN and CN pattern matching
6. Certificate depth limit validation MTLS-->>Auth: {Logistics_Warehouse} alt Certificate Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_TrackingNumber} else Certificate Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Auth->>Session: create_session(Logistics_DeliveryRoute}) Session-->>Auth: {Logistics_TrackingNumber} Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_Warehouse} end %% Authorization Flow (Logistics_StockLevel) Note over Client,Session: Authorization Flow Client->>Transport: check_permission(Logistics_StockLevel) Transport->>Auth: check_permission(Logistics_Warehouse) Auth->>Session: lookup session Session-->>Auth: #session{Logistics_TrackingNumber} alt Session Not Found Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_TrackingNumber} else Session Found Auth->>RBAC: check_user_permission(Logistics_StockLevel) RBAC->>RBAC: Get user roles from ETS Note right of RBAC: auth_user_roles:
UserId -> [Logistics_Warehouse] RBAC->>RBAC: Get allowed roles for resource+permission Note right of RBAC: auth_acls:
{Logistics_Warehouse} -> [Logistics_Warehouse] RBAC->>RBAC: Check intersection Note right of RBAC: lists:any/2
UserRole ∩ AllowedRoles ≠ ∅ alt Permission Denied RBAC-->>Auth: {Logistics_DeliveryRoute} Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_DeliveryRoute} else Permission Granted RBAC-->>Auth: ok Auth-->>Client: ok end end %% Default RBAC Roles Note over RBAC: Default Roles (Logistics_TrackingNumber):
🔹 admin: [Logistics_TrackingNumber]
🔹 user: [Logistics_StockLevel]
🔹 guest: [Logistics_FleetManagement] %% Token Rotation Note over Client,Session: Token Rotation (Logistics_Warehouse) Client->>Auth: rotate_token(Logistics_StockLevel) Auth->>Session: lookup session Auth->>Auth: generate new SessionId Note right of Auth: crypto:strong_rand_bytes(Logistics_FleetManagement)
base64 encoded Auth->>Session: insert new session Auth->>Session: delete old session Auth-->>Client: {Logistics_FleetManagement} Note right of Auth: Old session invalidated immediately
Prevents session hijacking %% Token Revocation Note over Client,Session: Token Revocation (Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Client->>Auth: revoke_token(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Auth->>Auth: insert into auth_revoked_tokens Note right of Auth: Store: Token -> RevokedAt
Auto-cleanup after 7 days Auth-->>Client: ok Note over Auth,JWT: Revoked tokens rejected immediately
Even if exp claim valid %% Session Cleanup Note over Session: Auto-cleanup every 60 seconds:
• Expired sessions (Logistics_FleetManagement)
• Revoked tokens (Logistics_TrackingNumber)
• OAuth2 cache (Logistics_DeliveryRoute)
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
